# mtt status: single gated flow transition
exec mtt init
# install a single-type flow with gate commands (task is a root default type)
cp gated.yaml .mtt/config.yaml
exec mtt add 'A'
stdout 'created t1'

# green gate: tbd -> in_progress runs `echo $((3+4))`, moves, records history.
# pipeline progress goes to stderr; command output is redirected to a file.
exec mtt status t1 in_progress --log-file build.log
stdout 't1: tbd → in_progress'
# flow guidance printed inline on stdout: edge desc, status desc, and next moves
stdout '▸ review the spec, create a branch'
stdout '▸ do the work; commit as you go'
stdout 'next: done \(quality gate\) · cancelled'
stderr '\(exit 0,'
grep '7' build.log
exec mtt show t1
stdout '\[in_progress\]'
# show surfaces the current status's guidance: its description + onward moves
stdout '▸ do the work; commit as you go'
stdout 'next:.*done \(quality gate\) · cancelled'
stdout 'history:'
stdout 'tbd → in_progress'

# red gate: in_progress -> done runs `false` -> blocked; task stays put.
# the failing command's progress line is on stderr.
! exec mtt status t1 done
stderr 'blocked'
stderr '\(exit 1,'
exec mtt show t1
stdout '\[in_progress\]'

# --no-run bypasses the gate; guidance still prints (the move happened), and a
# terminal status has no onward moves -> the edge desc shows but no "next:" line.
exec mtt status t1 done --no-run
stdout 't1: in_progress → done'
stdout '▸ quality gate'
! stdout 'next:'

# invalid transition: done is terminal (no outgoing edge)
! exec mtt status t1 cancelled
stderr 'not allowed'

-- gated.yaml --
version: 1
project:
  name: demo
command_timeout: 5m
types:
  - name: task
    prefix: t
    default: true
    parents: []
    statuses:
      - {name: tbd, kind: initial}
      - {name: in_progress, kind: active, description: "do the work; commit as you go"}
      - {name: done, kind: terminal}
      - {name: cancelled, kind: terminal}
    transitions:
      - {from: tbd, to: in_progress, description: "review the spec, create a branch", commands: ["echo $((3+4))"]}
      - {from: tbd, to: cancelled}
      - {from: in_progress, to: done, description: "quality gate", commands: ["false"]}
      - {from: in_progress, to: cancelled}
